jp.title: 『FF7 リベレーション』2027年春発売、リメイク3作目は全機種対応。飛空艇ハイウインドでオープンワールドを移動、ウェポンの映像も公開【ファイナルファンタジーVII REVELATION】

jp.title: 8日にかけて沖縄や九州から東海で大雨 台風6号と同じような場所で再び災害のおそれ
jp.description: 熱帯低気圧(台風のたまご)は温帯低気圧に変わり、明日7日(日)から8日(月)にかけて九州から関東の南岸を進むでしょう。先日、台風6号の影響で大雨となった沖縄や九州から東海で再び大雨が予想されています。土砂災害や低い土地の浸水、川の増水や氾濫に警戒してください。

jp.title: 《どうなる“ポスト嵐”》直属後輩のACEes、ニノが目をかけているM!LK、“セカンドチャンス”を掴んだモナキ…注目の“次世代ボーイズグループ”（NEWSポストセブン）
jp.description: 惜しまれつつも活動終了となってしまった嵐。今後、彼らのような国民的アイドルグループは登場するのだろうか。放送作家でコラムニストの山田美保子さんが、注目のボーイズグループを紹介します。

world.title: 'Made in Pakistan' tag found on bedsheet after washing, probe underway
world.description: The incident comes days after three people were arrested in Maharashtra's Sambhajinagar district for allegedly selling cosmetic products labelled "Made in Pakistan".

world.title: AMECEA: PIHD Department Hosts Synodality Workshop in Lusaka, Zambia
world.description:
Sandra Kunda
The AMECEA PIHD Capacity-Building Workshop on Advancing the spirit of synodality in the integral human development mission of the Church in the region was held over the last three days in Lusaka, bringing together Diocesan Justice and Peace officers and ZCCB.
Officially opening the meeting, Zambia Conference of Catholic Bishops (ZCCB) Secretary General, Rev. Fr. Francis Mukosa, said the gathering provides an opportunity for participants to reflect on synodality as the Church’s call to journey together as one People of God and its relationship with Integral Human Development.
Fr. Mukosa noted that synodality is not merely an event, but a way of being Church, in which every voice matters and the concerns of the poor and marginalized are heard through Justice and Peace programs. He added that Catholic radio stations play a critical role in promoting dialogue, amplifying community voices, and fostering hope through Gospel values.
He further emphasized that Integral Human Development goes beyond economic and social progress, focusing on the holistic growth of the human person in body, mind, and spirit, while promoting justice, peace, and solidarity.
Meanwhile, AMECEA Integral Human Development Department Coordinator, Fr. Paul Igweta, said the workshop was intended to examine various Church documents on Catholic Social Teaching and Integral Human Development.
He explained that the discussions were intended to deepen participants’ understanding of the Church’s mission in promoting human dignity, justice, peace, and sustainable development within the Church.
Day one covered, among other topics, the foundations of synodality and integral human development, as well as the identification of development challenges within the ecclesial context.
Day two covered synodal responses to conflict, climate justice, and ecological conversion. Day three focused on building a common framework and finalizing action plans.
Meanwhile, the training has come to an end with Fr. Gabriel Mapulanga closing the workshop, and participants have since thanked the conveners, AMECEA and ZCCB, saying the workshop is timely and will help in their synodal journey.
The workshop aimed to strengthen collaboration between the pastoral and communication ministries to advance the Church’s mission of evangelization and social transformation.
END

world.title: U.S. imports restricted from affected areas
world.description: Canada will place temporary import restrictions on livestock entering the country from affected areas in the U.S. after a case of screwworm was confirmed.

world.title: Fernando Alonso shares touching McLaren message during major F1 milestone
world.description: Fernando Alonso joined McLaren’s 1000th grand prix celebrations as he reflected on his history with the team

world.title: com brings Arnhem Land love story to Sydney Film Festival, with nod to Romeo and Juliet
world.description: In a First Nations romantic comedy debuting in Sydney this week, a new writer-director has used her lived experience to tell the story of young love in a remote Northern Territory community.

world.title: NASA Bids Farewell to MAVEN Mars Mission in Public Teleconference
world.description: The first mission devoted to observing the Martian atmosphere and its evolution, NASA’s MAVEN (Mars Atmosphere and Volatile Evolution), has ended after more than 11 years in orbit at Mars and a decade beyond its primary, one-year mission.

world.title: Navy’s £3bn flagship carrier breaks down again
world.description: HMS Prince of Wales forced to dock in Norway for repairs

world.title: Man arrested after stabbing at Auckland CBD Kāinga Ora complex
world.description: Emergency services were called to an apartment building on Greys Avenue at around 10.35pm after reports that two people had received stab wounds.

world.title: Devoy, Umeh and Ndaba set to start in Montreal
world.description: Bohemians captain Dawson Devoy and Jaden Umeh are among six changes to the Republic of Ireland starting team for tonight's friendly against Canada in Montreal.
